allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['id'][:80], r['title'][:40]\) for r in d['results'][:3]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); eps=d.get\('episodes',[]\); [print\(eps[0]['id'][:100]\) for _ in [1]] if eps else print\('No episodes:', d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['results'][0]['id'] if d['results'] else 'no results'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); eps=d.get\('episodes',[]\); print\(eps[0]['id'] if eps else 'no eps'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); src=d.get\('sources',[]\); print\(src[0]['url'][:80] if src else 'no sources', '| isM3U8:', src[0].get\('isM3U8'\) if src else None\)")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('@consumet/extensions'\); const p = new c.ANIME.AnimeSaturn\(\); p.search\('spy x family'\).then\(r => console.log\('Results:', r.results?.length, r.results?.[0]?.id\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('ERROR:', e.message\)\)")

Bash(curl -s --max-time 10 -X POST https://api.allanime.day/api -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"query\($search:SearchInput\){shows\(search:$search,limit:5,page:1,countryOrigin:ALL\){edges{_id,name,availableEpisodesDetail}}}","variables":{"search":{"query":"spy x family"}}}')
Bash(curl -sv --max-time 15 --insecure -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36' https://anitaku.pe/spy-x-family-episode-1)
Bash(curl -s --max-time 15 -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36' https://ok.ru/videoembed/3929123261074)

Bash(curl -sI --max-time 10 -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' https://tools.fast4speed.rsvp//media6/videos/LGPNPnjSRKx8TqkGq/sub/1)
